mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.username, m.movie_name, col.personal_rating as current_rating, ru.username as reply_to_username FROM movie_comment c JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id JOIN movie_public m ON c.movie_id = m.movie_id LEFT JOIN movie_collection col ON col.user_id = c.user_id AND col.movie_id = c.movie_id LEFT JOIN user ru ON ru.user_id = c.reply_to WHERE c.movie_id = #{movieId} AND (c.reply_to IS NULL OR c.reply_to = 0) ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.*, u.username, col.personal_rating as current_rating FROM movie_comment c JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN movie_collection col ON col.user_id = c.user_id AND col.movie_id = c.movie_id WHERE c.reply_to = #{comment_id} ORDER BY c.create_time ASC
SELECT c.*, u.username, m.movie_name FROM movie_comment c JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id JOIN movie_public m ON c.movie_id = m.movie_id WHERE c.comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO movie_comment (movie_id, user_id, content, reply_to) VALUES (#{movieId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{replyTo})
mapper.update: UPDATE movie_comment SET content = #{content}, is_edited = TRUE, update_time = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.username, m.movie_name FROM movie_comment c JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id JOIN movie_public m ON c.movie_id = m.movie_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
SELECT c.*, u.username, m.movie_name FROM movie_comment c JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id JOIN movie_public m ON c.movie_id = m.movie_id WHERE m.tmdb_id = #{tmdbId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.*, u.username, m.movie_name FROM movie_comment c JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id JOIN movie_public m ON c.movie_id = m.movie_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.movie_id = #{movieId} LIMIT 1
